## Checklist

- [ ] Backend: `ruff check app tests` and `pytest -q` pass
- [ ] Web: `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run build` pass (if web changed)
- [ ] Android: `./gradlew assembleDebug` passes (if android changed)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changed backend behaviour
- [ ] No secrets or personal details added
